mapper.select: SELECT role_id, role_name, role_code, description, tenant_id, is_system_role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM roles WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
SELECT role_id, role_name, role_code, description, tenant_id, is_system_role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM roles WHERE role_code = #{roleCode}
SELECT role_id, role_name, role_code, description, tenant_id, is_system_role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM roles WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT role_id, role_name, role_code, description, tenant_id, is_system_role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM roles WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY role_code
SELECT role_id, role_name, role_code, description, tenant_id, is_system_role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM roles WHERE is_system_role = TRUE ORDER BY role_code
SELECT role_id, role_name, role_code, description, tenant_id, is_system_role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM roles ORDER BY is_system_role DESC, role_code

SELECT r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description, r.tenant_id, r.is_system_role, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM roles r INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.role_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO roles (role_id, role_name, role_code, description, tenant_id, is_system_role, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{roleName}, #{roleCode}, #{description}, #{tenantId}, #{isSystemRole}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM roles WHERE role_code = #{roleCode})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role_permissions (role_id, permission_id, granted_at) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (role_id, permission_id) DO NOTHING
